response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to agentic AI tooling at Stripe, but lacks demonstrable production leadership in multi-agent AI systems for fintech, regulatory compliance infrastructure, or scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI tooling at Stripe via MCP frameworks
Proven experience with event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or building technical leadership layers
No clear track record in credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance systems
